title: Orchidium boreale

taxonomy: Orchidium boreale is classified as a genus within the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of orchid native to Borneo. The Orchidaceae family is the largest flowering plant family, comprising over 30,000 species. Orchidium boreale is further classified into various species, but more research is required to determine the exact classification. The classification of Orchidium boreale is still a subject of ongoing research in the field of botany.
